title: Creative Social Media Content Designer using Canva & AI Tools
desc: We are looking for a skilled Creative Designer to craft eye-catching social media visuals utilizing Canva and AI technologies. The perfect candidate will possess a knack for visual storytelling, a solid understanding of design fundamentals, and the creativity to develop graphics that connect with our audience. You will work closely with our marketing team to ensure that all content reflects our brand identity and supports our marketing objectives. If you have a passion for design and an innovative mindset, we would love to hear from you! The Ideal Candidate will: Create static and light-motion ad creatives in Canva Generate AI-enhanced product visuals and lifestyle imagery with Higgsfield AI & Nano Banana Develop multiple creative concepts from a single marketing angle Produce variations for Meta advertising campaigns Follow creative briefs and brand guidelines Requirements: Strong Canva skills (required) Experience with AI creative tools (Higgsfield, Midjourney, Flux, ChatGPT, etc.) Strong design sense and marketing intuition Ability to work with limited source assets Experience creating social media advertisements

title: Data Visualisation / Infographic Designer
desc: We are looking for an experienced data visualisation and infographic designer to help refine an existing infographic and develop a small set of related infographic-style pages. The core design direction is already in place. We need someone with strong layout, information design, typography, and visual hierarchy skills to improve the clarity, polish, and presentation of the work. The project includes: Refining an existing infographic design Improving layout, spacing, hierarchy, icons, charts, and visual flow Creating related infographic pages in the same visual style Turning complex information into clear, professional visual communication Preparing final artwork for digital use and possible presentation/PDF use You should have experience with: Infographic design Data visualisation Editorial-style layouts Presenting complex ideas clearly Figma, Canva Creating clean, professional, modern design systems We are not looking for generic template design. The work needs to feel considered, polished, and commercially ready. Please include examples of previous infographic, report, dashboard, or data visualisation work in your application. Do not include generic templates - only custom work created by you. Must be available for a video call if required. Must be prepared to work in a team, a

title: Design Deck with App Mockup
desc: I need a deck designed according to our brand guidelines and integrated with app mockup UI/UX screenshots. The deck should be visually appealing and effectively communicate our product's features and benefits. The ideal candidate will have experience in UI/UX design and presentation creation.

title: Digital Greeting Card designer
desc: We are looking for a reliable contract graphic designer to help create digital greeting card designs for a growing greeting card platform. This is an ongoing freelance opportunity with consistent work available. Project Overview You will design 3-panel greeting cards (front cover, inside left, inside right). Each card should feel polished, creative, and gift-worthy. We will provide everything you need for each assignment, including: - Card category (birthday, graduation, holiday, etc.) - Requested design style or theme - Complete card copy Your role is to create the visual design and layout for the card. Project Structure Cards will be assigned in batches of 10 designs at a time. Pay: $10 per completed card Batch total: $100 for 10 cards Potential for ongoing work if the collaboration is successful Card Format Requirements Each greeting card includes 3 panels: 1. Front Cover Visually engaging design Headline/title only 2. Inside Left Minimal design No text 3. Inside Right Greeting card message Final files should be delivered as separate high-resolution PNG files for each panel. Commercial Use & Copyright Requirements All designs created for this project will be used commercially as part of our greeting card platform. By accepting this project, you agree that: - All work must be 1

title: Dynamic YouTube Thumbnail Design Needed
desc: I need custom thumbnails for an ongoing series of YouTube videos. Every episode has a slightly different tone, so the visual style will shift as well—some weeks a clean, minimalist look feels right, while other topics call for bold, vibrant colour, and the occasional video needs a crisp, professional touch. Regardless of style, each thumbnail must include: • A well-cut photo of the featured person • Short, eye-catching text that matches the video title • Simple icons or graphic accents that reinforce the topic Core specs: 1280 × 720 px, under 2 MB, delivered as layered PSD or AI plus a ready-to-upload JPG. Turnaround is 24 h per thumbnail once I supply the assets and brief. The final image should pop at a glance, read clearly on mobile, and stay on-brand with the channel’s palette and typography.

title: Elegant Instagram Post Designs
desc: I'm looking for a talented graphic artist to create Instagram posts. The preferred style is elegant and classy. Requirements: - Create visually appealing posts, primarily focused on [please specify content type, e.g., product promotions, inspirational quotes, customer testimonials]. - Incorporate my brand color palette, with the flexibility for modifications. Ideal Skills and Experience: - Strong portfolio showcasing elegant and classy designs. - Experience in creating Instagram content. - Proficiency in design software (e.g., Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator). - Ability to work within brand guidelines and adapt to feedback. Please include samples of relevant work.

title: Engaging Social Media Graphics Needed
desc: I’m after fresh, scroll-stopping social media graphics to boost my online presence. This is firmly a design and creative job—specifically graphic design geared toward social channels. Here’s what I need: • A cohesive set of visuals sized for Instagram, Facebook, and X/Twitter (feed and story dimensions). • Designs that respect my existing color palette, fonts, and tone (I’ll supply brand assets as soon as we start). • Editable source files (PSD, AI, or Figma) plus ready-to-post PNGs/JPEGs optimised for each platform. Clean typography, balanced layouts, and a modern aesthetic are important to me. If you’re comfortable working with Adobe Creative Cloud or Figma and can turn around polished graphics quickly, let’s talk—I’m ready to get started right away and provide clear, timely feedback as we move from draft to final.

title: Expert Graphic Designer Needed To Design Facebook Ads
desc: I am looking to work with a Graphic designer long term who can design ads for our Facebook and Instagram campaigns. Must be able to design scroll stopping creatives and have experience with photoshop and other software. We are not looking to get images generated by ChatGPT. We need a real designer who is passionate about design work. We can pay $10 per image and will be needed numerous designs per client and on going designs to test each month. Please send examples of past Facebook ads that you designed to apply.

title: Final Exit Visa Story Cover
desc: I’m promoting a Final Exit Visa service to Bangladeshi expatriates living in Saudi Arabia and I need a single 1080 × 1920 Instagram-Story-sized cover that will also double as the thumbnail for my Facebook ad video. The design must instantly convey safe, premium travel from Saudi Arabia to Bangladesh while looking clean, trustworthy, and scroll-stopping. Visual direction • Emphasise an airplane and a passport in the composition; an airport backdrop can support the concept if it doesn’t clutter the frame. • Work in rich yet balanced colours that feel professional rather than overly flashy. • Use stylish Bangla typography for the three copy lines exactly as written: ১. ফাইনাল একজিট ভিসায় দেশে যেতে চান? ২. আউটপাস / ফাইনাল এ Practical requirements • Canvas: 1080 × 1920 px (vertical). • The finished graphic must look razor-sharp both as a static story slide and as the freeze-frame cover of the video. • Supply the layered, fully editable source file—PSD or AI is fine—as well as a ready-to-use high-resolution export (PNG or JPG). • Turnaround is urgent; I need first draft concepts quickly and final delivery as soon as approved. If this sounds clear, let me know how soon you can show an initial draft and I’ll share any brand colours or logos you may need.

title: Flyer Design for New Business
desc: I have created two flyers using AI and would like to have them redesigned. My goal is to align them with my existing branding and remove the autogenerated look. Please let me know if you can assist with this project and what information you need from me to get started.

title: Graphic Designer
desc: I run a political direct mail firm (if it matters to you, we work with Democrats, but we don't care about your political persuasion). We need freelance graphic designers to add to our roster to help us design creative, compelling mail for our clients. We create mail across a range of sizes, from 4x6 to 11x17 generally. While mail is a majority of our work, we sometimes also make logos, brochures, flyers, or social media graphics. REQUIREMENTS: - Review design concept memos and create drafts of pieces for approval - Collaborate over Slack, Google Workspace, and in-house tracking software to ensure pieces are moved through an approvals process - We prioritize speed: if you can commit to owning a piece and turning around edits quickly, you'll rise quickly in our ranks - We are looking for per-piece flat rate prices

title: Graphic Designer (Social Media Graphics for Tech Startup)
desc: Hi! We're a tech startup looking for a talented graphic designer to create 2–3 infographics showcasing key features of our software for social media. The brief: - We'll provide screenshots of our platform - You'll design clean, eye-catching infographics that highlight specific features/benefits - Style should match the reference image attached (please review before applying) What we're looking for: - Strong portfolio of SaaS/tech infographics or social media graphics - Eye for clean, modern design with clear visual hierarchy - Ability to make UI screenshots look polished and engaging - Source files provided on completion (Figma, Illustrator, or similar) To apply, please share: 2–3 relevant samples from your portfolio Your rate (per graphic or for the full project) Estimated turnaround time A short note on your approach If this first batch goes well, there's potential for ongoing work as we expand our content. Thank you!

title: Graphic Designer for Social Media & Branding Projects
desc: We are looking for a talented Graphic Designer to support our marketing projects by creating professional social media visuals and marketing materials. The ideal candidate has experience designing content for platforms such as Instagram, Facebook, LinkedIn, and TikTok, and understands how visual communication supports brand growth. Additional experience with content planning, social media management, or branding projects is considered a plus. Requirements: Strong portfolio of social media designs Good understanding of branding and visual consistency Attention to detail Good communication skills Fluent English Please send: Portfolio Relevant work examples Hourly rate We are interested in building a long-term collaboration with the right person.

title: Graphic Designer | Corporate Design
desc: Flow Keeping is looking for a reliable freelance graphic designer to support the creation of branded marketing assets for our funnel, Google Ads campaigns, social media content, landing pages, and ongoing digital marketing needs. We are building out a full marketing system and need someone who can help us create high-quality visuals that are clean, modern, polished, and aligned with our brand. This role is ideal for a designer who understands how to design for marketing performance, not just aesthetics. The right person should be able to take direction, work from existing brand assets, follow creative briefs, and produce designs that feel consistent across multiple channels. We need someone who can move quickly, communicate clearly, and help us get a strong volume of useful creative without exceeding the budget. This will begin as a part-time role with a maximum of 20 hours per week. If the working relationship is successful, this may become an ongoing role for future campaigns, content launches, ad creative, and brand development. About Flow Keeping Flow Keeping helps customers better understand and manage their water usage through smart, practical, and easy-to-understand solutions. Our brand needs to feel trustworthy, modern, helpful, clean, and professional. The design style s

title: Infographic Designer for Software Explanation
desc: I am looking for someone that can create infographics for web and marketing that can inform readers as to how a fairly technical software product works. The focus is on making complex concepts visually appealing and easy to understand. The ideal candidate should have experience in graphic design and possibly technical writing to effectively communicate software functionality.

title: Instagram Promo Image Creation
desc: I need a steady stream of professional, clean images for my Instagram feed, each one focused on branding and promotions. Every post must feel cohesive with the colours, fonts, and voice already used across my profile while still standing out in the scroll. Here’s how we’ll work together: I’ll send campaign briefs, key messages, and timing. You’ll turn them into single-frame graphics that look polished on both mobile and desktop. Tools such as Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, or any comparable pro software are fine, provided the final files stay fully editable. Deliverables • 1080×1080 px (or 1080×1350 px) JPG/PNG ready to upload • Layered source file (PSD/AI) • Short alt-text or caption suggestion for each image Acceptance criteria • Precise use of my brand colours and typography • Clean, uncluttered layout that highlights the promotion • File size under 2 MB and delivered at least 24 h before posting When you reply, please include samples of similar promotional images you’ve produced and let me know your weekly image capacity.

title: LinkedIn Photo Replacement
desc: I need an image edit for my LinkedIn profile. Requirements: - Replace an existing picture with my provided picture. - The existing picture is a portrait. desc: I am currently developing a software company that specialises with queue management systems. I had a chatgpt generated logo which turned out really good. If this interest you let me know and we can discuss.

desc: I need a professional to enhance my existing logo created on chat gpt. desc: I'm in need of a minimalistic design for a proposal submission form. The form should be visually appealing yet simple, embodying an elegant and sophisticated aesthetic. It should prompt for a minimum 100-character response, asking what makes the submitter the best candidate. The design should use pastel colors, steering clear of bold and dark shades. Ideal skills for this job include: - Graphic Design - UI/UX Design - Proficiency in design software such as Adobe Illustrator or Sketch - Understanding of minimalistic design principles

title: Mixed-Style Videos for App Launch
desc: # Video Creator & Marketing Partner Needed for GetItDone Launch GetItDone is just weeks away from launch, and we're looking for a talented video creator/marketing partner to help us build a professional, high-impact launch campaign. GetItDone is a mobile app that helps users get everyday tasks and services done quickly by connecting them with trusted service providers. ## What We're Looking For We're not looking for a basic video editor. We're looking for someone who can think creatively, contribute ideas, and help shape the visual storytelling of the brand during launch and beyond. This can be a **monthly retainer or task-based collaboration**, depending on the right fit. ## Deliverables * App Launch Video (60–90 sec) * Instagram Reels (15–30 sec) * Social Media Ad Creatives * Feature Highlight Videos * App Demo & User Journey Videos * Teaser & Countdown Content * Motion Graphics & UI Animations * Source Project Files ## Style We want a modern startup feel that combines: * Live-action footage * Mobile app screen recordings * Motion graphics * Product storytelling * Social-first content designed primarily for Instagram ## What We Provide * Figma Designs * Beta App Access * Branding Assets * App Screens & Recordings * Product Direction ## Ideal Candidate * Experience with app laun

title: Monthly Basis Video Editing
desc: I have a steady stream of raw footage arriving every month and need a reliable editor who can turn it around consistently. Expect a variety of short- to mid-length pieces—some aimed at social channels, others formatted for more traditional uses. Each batch will come with clear briefs, reference links, and any branding assets required. Your typical pass will involve: • Tight cuts that keep the pacing engaging • Basic colour and audio balancing so everything feels polished • Simple titles, lower thirds, and captions when the brief calls for them • Final exports in platform-ready resolutions (usually 1080p or square/vertical variants) Project files (Premiere Pro or Final Cut) should be supplied alongside the mastered renders so adjustments can be made later if needed. Turnaround times will be agreed in advance at the start of each month. If this fits your wheelhouse and you’re looking for a predictable, month-to-month workload, let’s talk timelines and workflow.

title: Motion Designer for Social media
desc: Motion Designer Wanted We are looking for a creative and skilled Motion Designer who can bring ideas to life through engaging animations and visual storytelling. Responsibilities * Create high-quality motion graphics and animations for social media, advertisements, branding, and digital content * Work with video editors, designers, and creative teams to develop visual concepts * Animate logos, typography, transitions, UI elements, and promotional videos * Maintain visual consistency with brand identity and guidelines * Deliver projects within deadlines while maintaining quality Requirements * Proficiency in Adobe After Effects, Premiere Pro, and related creative tools * Strong understanding of animation principles, timing, and composition * Experience with motion graphics, kinetic typography, and visual effects * Creative mindset with attention to detail * Portfolio showcasing previous motion design work * Basic knowledge of 3D software (Blender/Cinema 4D) is a plus What We’re Looking For * Creativity and originality * Strong communication skills * Ability to work independently and collaboratively * Passion for modern design trends and storytelling If you are passionate about creating visually stunning motion content, we’d love to work with you.

title: Motion Graphics Editor for App Welcome Screen
desc: **Project Overview:** I have a short 5 second AI-generated video clip (9:16 portrait, 1080x1920) The clip features a logo explosion/reveal animation. I need a motion graphics editor to add an animated text overlay layer on top of the existing footage. blending in to the explosion **Scope of Work:** Add 15 animated text bursts to the video, each displaying the word "Welcome" in a different language, styled to replicate the visual aesthetic of a live stream chat interfaces. more can be discussed upon contract **The 15 Languages:** Welcome, Bienvenido, 欢迎, स्वागत है, أهلاً وسهلاً, Bienvenue, স্বাগতম, Добро пожаловать, Bem-vindo, Selamat datang, Willkommen, ようこそ, 환영합니다, Benvenuto, Hoş geldiniz **Animation Behaviour:** Each word must: 1. Burst and expand outward from center (scale up with energy) 2. Hold on screen briefly 3. Reverse/contract back in (scale back down, not just fade) 4. Transition seamlessly into the next language Overall feel should be fast, energetic and premium — consistent with platform UI aesthetics. **Deliverables:** - Final rendered video: 1080x1920, 30fps, MP4 - Clean export with no watermarks - Delivery within 3 **Software:** After Effects preferred. CapCut or DaVinci Resolve also acceptable if the quality matches the brief. Please include examples of previous

title: Motion Graphics Expert for AI Platform
desc: We need motion graphics experts to create stunning visual content using our AI platform and distribute it across social media to build awareness. The ideal candidate will have experience in animation and motion graphics, with a strong understanding of social media platforms. Responsibilities include designing engaging visuals, optimizing content for different platforms, and collaborating with our team to ensure brand consistency.

title: Motion Graphics and AI Video Creator
desc: I need a motion graphics professional with skills in AI graphics to help create a short video for the homepage of my website. The project involves crafting a visually appealing and engaging video that aligns with my brand's vision. The ideal candidate should have experience in animation and video production, with a strong portfolio showcasing previous work. Please only reach out if you have done very high end work please. The equivalent of Uber or Apple minimalistic design x Vogue standards. As the platform I’m creating is in that world of design. Attached are some design references for what the rest of the website looks like. I really like the work of mouthwash studio. Thank you!

title: Multi-Platform Social Media Creatives
desc: Daily short-form content—reels, carousel posts and polished photos—will keep our community engaged across Instagram, Facebook and TikTok. I already have detailed brand guidelines for colour, typography and tone, so every visual must align perfectly while still feeling fresh and scroll-stopping. The assignment covers the full cycle: selecting or retouching images, editing short videos, adding on-brand motion graphics or text, sizing for each platform and delivering ready-to-upload files. Adobe Photoshop, Illustrator, Premiere Pro or comparable tools are expected at a professional level; mobile-first extras like CapCut or InShot are a plus if they speed up reel production. Deliverables per week • 3–4 vertical reels (15–30 s, sound-synced, captioned) • 5 carousel sets (up to 10 frames each) • 10 single-image posts optimised for feed and story Acceptance criteria • Every asset matches the supplied brand kit and uses approved fonts, colours and logo placement. • Final files arrive in both editable source format and compressed platform-ready versions. • Turnaround on feedback is 24 h or less; two revision rounds included. A proven portfolio of social-media work of similar scale is essential, and links to live campaigns are preferred so I can see engagement results. Once we agree on the

title: Need vector artwork created for design file
desc: I have an AI generated logo design that I like so I do not need versions. But now I need to have put into vector artwork (svg file specifically). Looking for someone that can turn this around fairly quickly.

title: Online Advertisement Poster Design
desc: I need a striking digital poster to advertise my offer to the general public across social media and other online platforms. The design should immediately catch the eye, clearly communicate the key message, and be formatted for hassle-free upload to Instagram, Facebook, X, and story dimensions. Here is what I’m looking for: • Bold, clean layout that works well on mobile screens. • Compelling headline and concise copy that sells the offer at a glance. • High-resolution final files (PNG/JPEG) plus the editable source file so I can tweak dates or prices later if needed. • Colour palette and imagery that feel modern and trustworthy—nothing too niche; it must appeal broadly. • Fast turnaround and openness to a couple of quick revisions to fine-tune wording or placement. If you’re comfortable whipping up attention-grabbing advertisement creatives for an online audience, let’s get started—I’m ready to supply branding assets and the core message as soon as you accept the job.

title: Packaging Sticker Designer Needed (AI Skills Required) – Fast Turnaround
desc: We are looking for a talented graphic designer to create a premium-looking sticker/label for our knee brace packaging (10x10 cm) You will be provided with: -Our logo -Product image(s) -Brand colors -Text/content to include We need someone who: -Has experience designing product packaging or labels/stickers -Can use AI tools to create high-quality concepts and designs -Can start immediately -Works FAST and communicates well -Can provide multiple design options/concepts at the beginning -Is open to revisions and working closely with us to refine the final design -Understands print-ready formats and can deliver the correct files for printing Important: We are looking for someone who can move quickly. Our goal is to finalize the design within 48 hours, so fast communication and quick revisions are very important. The goal is to create a clean, professional, premium sticker design that fits our branding and packaging. Please send: -Relevant previous work (especially packaging/sticker/label design) -What AI tools you use in your workflow

title: Part-Time Graphic Designer
desc: We’re a Canadian marketing agency looking for a talented graphic designer to join us on a part-time basis. If you have a sharp eye for design and a passion for social media, we’d love to hear from you! What You’ll Be Working On: • Designing engaging Instagram posts and social media content • Creating custom images and visual assets for our website • Producing static display ads for Meta (Facebook/Instagram) and other advertising platforms Expect: • Part-time engagement to start • Hours and pay will grow as we build a working relationship • Long-term opportunity for the right person To apply, please share your portfolio and a brief note on your relevant experience. We look forward to connecting!

title: Pastel Social Media Photo Edits
desc: I have a batch of 11-30 images that I’ll be posting across Instagram, Facebook, and Pinterest, and I need them to share the same soft, pastel aesthetic. Each file already has solid composition; what I’m missing is the finishing touch that makes a feed look cohesive. Here’s exactly what I’m after: • Subtle color correction that shifts the palette toward gentle, pastel tones while keeping skin tones believable. • Clean background removal wherever distractions exist so products and people sit on a neutral, scroll-stopping backdrop. • Light retouching to clear up minor blemishes and stray hairs without giving the photos an over-edited feel. Please return the images in both high-resolution JPG (for archiving) and optimized PNG or JPG sized for social platforms. Consistent naming and layered PSDs are a plus if you work in Photoshop. Turnaround within a week would be ideal, but let me know if you need a bit more time; quality comes first. If this sounds like your style, show me one or two examples of similarly toned edits and let’s get started.

title: Performance Creative Designer (AI Ads) — Meta / Google Ads / YouTube | $600/month
desc: Overview: We are hiring a Performance Creative Designer to create high-converting ad creatives for paid campaigns across Meta, YouTube, and Google Ads. This is not a traditional design role — it is a performance-driven creative role where every asset is tested in real ad campaigns and measured by results. Your creatives will be judged by: Hook Rate (first 3 seconds retention) CTR (Click-through rate) CPA / ROAS performance Winning creatives will be scaled; low performers will be quickly iterated or replaced. What You Will Do: Create high-performing static ads and video ads Develop multiple creative variations (hooks, angles, formats, ratios) Build platform-specific creatives for: Meta (Reels / Feed / Stories) YouTube pre-roll Google display ads Align creatives with landing pages for better conversion Continuously improve creatives based on performance data Identify winning concepts and iterate quickly Share weekly insights: what worked, what didn’t, and what to test next Tools You Should Be Comfortable With: You don’t need all of them, but experience with AI creative tools is a plus: Video: Runway / Kling / Pika / Sora Image: Midjourney / Flux Editing: CapCut / After Effects Voice: ElevenLabs We care more about output and performance than tools. How We Work: Fast testing cycles (

title: Photo Color Restoration
desc: I need a professional to fully restore the colors in a photo. The jumper in the image should be mid navy blue. Requirements: - Apply full color restoration to the photo - Accurate color matching to my reference images - Deliver final image in high resolution Ideal Skills and Experience: - Expertise in photo editing and color correction - Proficiency with editing software (e.g., Photoshop) - Attention to detail and color accuracy - Experience with JPEG format Please provide examples of previous work.

title: Photo Cutout & Video Enhancements
desc: I have two related tasks that I’d like handled together to keep the visual style consistent across my project. First, I need a batch of photos cleaned up by removing their backgrounds. The final images have to be delivered as high-resolution PNGs with transparent backgrounds, ready to drop into web banners and social posts. Accuracy around hair edges and fine details is important, so please be comfortable with techniques such as layer masking and the refine-edge tools in Photoshop or similar software. Second, I have a short video that requires pacing polish through added effects and transitions. I’m aiming for smooth, modern animated cuts with tasteful text overlays that highlight key moments. No complex CGI—just clean animated transitions and crisp typography that complement the footage and keep viewers engaged. If you normally work in Premiere Pro, Final Cut, or After Effects, that’s perfect; just let me know which one so I can supply a compatible project file if needed. Deliverables • Edited photos: transparent-background PNGs (plus originals if you prefer) • Edited video: final export in MP4 (1080p) and the editable project file • Separate folder containing all overlay graphics and fonts used I’ll share the source images and raw video once we agree on timing. Let me know your

title: Photo Editing and Retouching
desc: I need someone to help me edit photos using Photoshop or similar software. The task involves enhancing and retouching images to improve their quality and appearance. The ideal candidate should have experience in photo editing and be able to deliver high-quality results efficiently.

title: Photo Retouching Specialist Needed
desc: I'm looking for a skilled photo editor to work on over 20 photos. The primary tasks involve basic retouching, specifically brightness and contrast adjustments, and color correction. Ideal Skills and Experience: - Proficiency in photo editing software (e.g., Adobe Photoshop, Lightroom) - Strong understanding of color theory and image composition - Attention to detail - Previous experience with similar projects Please share samples of your previous work.

The ideal candidate will have experience in photo editing and be proficient in using AI tools to achieve the desired color tone. title: Post-Production Video & Photo Talent Needed for Client Content Creation
desc: I am seeking a talented video and photo editor to join my videography business. The ideal candidate will have a passion for storytelling and experience in creating engaging video content for a diverse range of clients. Your role will involve working behind the scenes editing videos and photos, and delivering high-quality content that meets my clients needs for websites and social media. If you are creative, organized, and have a portfolio, I want to hear from you! Candidates will need to be proficient in video editing software mostly with DaVinci Resolve. Photoshop, Lightroom, and others for photos. This position may lead to a longer duration as an on-going assistant. Please check out my business instagram @houstonopolis to get a sense of the social media content I create for current customers. As I bring in more clients, my time will be in the field and less handling post-production work so attention to detail and creation will be important. Thank you and I look forward to connecting with you! John

title: Posts IA para LinkedIn
desc: Soy responsable de la estrategia de contenidos de una marca B2B y necesito a un diseñador gráfico nativo en español que me ayude a crear posts estáticos para LinkedIn. Qué busco • Diseños modernos, limpios y coherentes con nuestra identidad, paleta y tipografía corporativa. • Imágenes fijas generadas o mejoradas con ayuda de IA (Midjourney, DALL-E, Stable Diffusion, etc.) y ajustadas en Photoshop o Illustrator si hace falta. • Formato optimizado para LinkedIn (1200 × 1200 px y 1350 × 1080 px). • Entrega de los archivos finales en PNG + el editable en PSD, AI o Figma. Flujo de trabajo 1. Yo proporciono el copy, referencias visuales y tonos de color. 2. Tú propones dos bocetos rápidos generados con IA. 3. Selecciono uno, lo refinamos y recibo la versión final lista para publicar. Requisitos • Español nativo: los textos dentro de la pieza deben quedar impecables. • Experiencia demostrable en posts estáticos para redes (comparte tu trabajo anterior en la propuesta; es lo único que evaluaré). • Conocimiento de buenas prácticas en LinkedIn: jerarquía, legibilidad y uso responsable de hashtags. Si cumples con lo anterior y disfrutas combinar IA con retoque profesional, estaré encantado de revisar tu portafolio.

title: Premium Executive Presentation Design
desc: Scope of Work Premium Executive Presentation Design We are seeking a highly creative and experienced presentation designer to create a world-class keynote presentation related to digital transformation, governance, operational ecosystems, and smart regulatory enablement. This is NOT a standard corporate PowerPoint presentation. The objective is to create a visually stunning, cinematic, modern, and globally competitive presentation that tells a strategic transformation story similar to presentations produced for major technology conferences and global innovation forums. Presentation Objective The presentation should communicate how a large-scale national initiative transformed complex regulatory and operational activities into a fully connected digital ecosystem that supports: Consumer trust Fair trade Operational transparency Digital governance Nationwide scalability Real-time supervision and traceability The presentation should feel inspirational, futuristic, and executive-level. Required Presentation Style The desired style should resemble: Apple keynote presentations Deloitte / Accenture innovation presentations Global technology conference presentations Smart city / digital transformation storytelling The presentation should focus heavily on: Visual storytelling Minimal text

title: Premium Graphic Designer Needed for Social Media Carousels + Brand Visuals
desc: I’m looking for an exceptional graphic designer to create premium social media carousels, visual posts, story graphics, reel covers, testimonial visuals, and promotional assets for my personal brand, live events, coaching programs, and services. My brand is in the world of mindset, performance psychology, sales coaching, motivation, business growth, and high-performance personal development. The visual style must feel: Nike x Netflix x Apple Premium. Cinematic. Minimal. Bold. Emotional. Clean. Iconic. This is not basic Canva template design. I need someone who can help build a recognisable visual identity across my social media platforms and create visuals that feel world-class. You will be designing assets for: * Instagram carousels * Social media quote graphics * Event promotion visuals * Coaching program visuals * Reel covers * Story graphics * Testimonial graphics * Launch campaign assets * Brand awareness posts * PDF/page layouts when needed The work must feel: * Premium and high-status * Cinematic and emotionally powerful * Clean, minimal and modern * Strong with typography * Consistent with the brand * Built to stop the scroll * Suitable for promoting events, coaching, programs and services I’m looking for someone who understands spacing, hierarchy, typography, emotion, br

title: Print-Ready Advertising Board Graphics
desc: I’m preparing a set of 1200 mm × 300 mm advertising boards and need each layout turned into a press-ready file. You’ll receive a folder of photographs in mixed proportions along with our logo, tagline and contact details; the job is to weave those elements into a balanced, eye-catching composition that holds sharpness at full size. Because these will go straight to the sign printer, I’ll need: • A CMYK, 300 dpi file at full dimensions with 3 mm bleed all round (PDF or AI preferred, with fonts outlined) • A web-resolution JPEG for internal approval • Any working files in case we update the campaign later Please allow for subtle colour correction so every photo looks consistent across each board. If you spot any resolution issues in the images I send, flag them early so we can swap them out. The image of the cow should be paired with the shook cow text I’m ready to supply the assets immediately and can answer layout or brand-guideline questions as you go. Looking forward to seeing how you arrange the shots and bring the design together.

title: Product Catalog Design
desc: I'm looking for a talented designer to create a professional and visually appealing product catalog. The catalog will be 1-10 pages long and needs to be delivered in both print-ready PDF and digital formats. Requirements: - Eye-catching layout and design - High-quality images and graphics - Clear and concise product descriptions - Consistent branding throughout the catalog Ideal Skills and Experience: - Proven experience in catalog design - Strong graphic design skills - Proficiency in design software (e.g., Adobe InDesign, Illustrator) - Attention to detail and creativity Please provide samples of previous work.

title: Product Label Design with Locked Elements - SB14
desc: We are seeking a talented graphic designer to create one product label design centered around locked elements; the design will then be applied to five different labels. The labels should be eye-catching and effectively communicate the essence of the scent profile. Candidates should be proficient in design software and have a strong portfolio showcasing similar work. Attention to detail and creativity are essential for this project. We have attached a mock-up inspiration design for the 'FIRECRACKER' label. This includes the background and scent name. We have also uploaded the working files that should be used to build the new labels. Scent Profile: FIRECRACKER Scent Name: Create font identical to the upload mock-up Background: Fireworks exploding on black background. We need the final design to match the upload as close as possible

title: Professional 3-4 min Walkthrough Video -- 2
desc: Need a video graphic expert to create a professional 3-4 min video on a platform walkthrough. Script, video files and storyboard will be provided. Delivery in 2 days. Technical expectations: • Final deliverable: 1920×1080 MP4 (H.264) plus the editable project files (Premiere Pro or After Effects preferred). • Audio sweetening: level dialogue • Turnaround: first cut in 24 hours, final revisions wrapped within the 48-hour window.
